runs.brief_en: Trump unveiled interim Air Force One with Starlink aboard. SpaceX slipped a Vandenberg Starlink launch to June 21. Fortune flagged rising SpaceX–Tesla merger odds after the IPO rally. Musk’s Tesla stake nears 20% voting power after his options exercise.
runs.brief_zh: 川普公布裝星鏈臨時空軍一號；范登堡星鏈發射延至6/21；外媒指SpaceX併購特斯拉機率升；馬斯克特斯拉持股逼近兩成投票權。

runs.brief_en: Overnight: Trump confirmed Starlink on the interim Air Force One; a Tesla driver told Texas police Autopilot was on before a fatal Katy home crash; SpaceX readied Starlink 17-28 from Vandenberg; and June 20 press kept focus on slow Optimus/Robotaxi ramps and rising SpaceX–Tesla merger talk.
runs.brief_zh: 昨夜動態：川普證實新空軍一號搭載 Starlink；德州凱蒂特斯拉疑 Autopilot 失控撞入民宅致死；SpaceX 準備發射 Starlink 17-28；媒體持續關注 Optimus／Robotaxi 慢速量產與 SpaceX 併購特斯拉傳聞升溫。

runs.brief_en: Trump unveiled an interim Air Force One with Starlink; Grok’s Pentagon war role drew fresh scrutiny; Tesla pushed robotaxi readiness with Cybercab pickup drills and a new FSD ad while a fatal Katy crash made headlines; SpaceX got MSCI’s lowest ESG grade; Dana White said a Musk–Zuckerberg UFC bout was real.
runs.brief_zh: 川普新專機裝Starlink；五角大廈稱Grok助伊朗戰役；Cybercab實測上下車、FSD新廣告；德州特斯拉致命事故；SpaceX獲MSCI最低ESG；白稱馬斯克對戰祖克柏曾認真談判。

runs.brief_en: A Tesla on driver-assist crashed into a Katy, Texas home, killing a resident as investigators probe Autopilot. A Semi was spotted with FSD validation gear. Musk told the Abundance Summit the global economy could 10x in ten years with a moon base. Trump confirmed Starlink on interim Air Force One. Tesla amplified FSD wins; X is promoting Grok Build.
runs.brief_zh: 德州特斯拉輔助駕駛撞入民宅致死，調查進行中；Semi現FSD驗證設備。馬斯克預言十年經濟十倍增長及月球基地。川普新空軍一號裝Starlink。特斯拉推廣FSD；X推Grok Build。

runs.brief_en: Elon Musk amplified his forecast of a 10x global economy and moon base in 10 years barring WW3, clarified that Europe must adopt reusable rockets or 'cease to exist in any meaningful sense,' and said a California school administrator keeping gender transitions secret from parents of kindergarteners 'should go to prison for severe child abuse.' SpaceX launched 24 more Starlink satellites successfully from Vandenberg.
runs.brief_zh: 馬斯克預測10年經濟10倍成長與月球基地，澄清歐洲需可重複火箭否則消失，並指加州幼兒園隱瞞性別轉換管理員應入獄。SpaceX成功發射24顆Starlink。

items_flat.title_en: Musk forecasts 10x economy and moon base in 10 years
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克預測10年內經濟成長10倍並建立月球基地
items_flat.summary_en: At the 2026 Abundance Summit, Elon Musk told Peter Diamandis that barring major world war, the global economy could grow more than tenfold in a decade and a self-sustaining moon base could arrive on the same timeline. Musk quote-posted the clip today with 'Wild times ahead!' amplifying his long-term vision.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克在2026 Abundance Summit 對Peter Diamandis表示，若無重大世界大戰，全球經濟10年內可成長超過10倍，自給自足的月球基地可能同期實現。他今日在X轉發影片並寫「Wild times ahead!」，強調長期願景。
items_flat.musk_quote: I'd say the economy is 10 times the its current size in 10 years. ... In the absence of World War III ... the economy 10xes in 10 years and have a base on the moon. Wild times ahead!
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 我會說經濟規模在10年內會是現在的10倍以上……若無第三次世界大戰……經濟將在10年內成長10倍，並擁有月球基地。未來將非常精彩！

items_flat.title_en: Fatal Katy, Texas Tesla crash; driver claims automated assist engaged
items_flat.title_zh: 德州Katy致命車禍；駕駛稱特斯拉自動輔助系統已啟動
items_flat.summary_en: Harris County authorities reported a Tesla Model 3 failed to turn at an intersection on June 20 evening, sped into a Katy-area home and killed 69-year-old Martha Avila inside. The 44-year-old driver told deputies an automated driving-assistance system was engaged. Investigators are verifying; the incident comes amid ongoing federal FSD scrutiny.
items_flat.summary_zh: Harris County當局表示，6月20日晚間一輛特斯拉Model 3未轉彎，高速衝入Katy地區民宅，撞死屋內69歲Martha Avila。44歲駕駛告訴警員自動駕駛輔助系統已啟動。調查人員正驗證；此事件正值聯邦FSD審查期間。

items_flat.title_en: Trump unveils interim Air Force One with Starlink communications
items_flat.title_zh: 川普揭露配備Starlink通訊的臨時空軍一號
items_flat.summary_en: President Donald Trump formally introduced a Qatar-gifted Boeing 747-8 at Joint Base Andrews on June 19 as an interim Air Force One, highlighting advanced communications including SpaceX Starlink. He remarked that 'my friend Elon is going to be very happy.' The roughly $400 million jet is a stopgap before new VC-25B aircraft.
items_flat.summary_zh: 美國總統唐納·川普6月19日在安德魯斯聯合基地正式介紹卡達贈送的波音747-8，稱為配備先進通訊（包括SpaceX Starlink）的臨時空軍一號。他表示「我的朋友Elon會很開心」。這架約4億美元的飛機是新VC-25B服役前的過渡機型。

items_flat.title_en: Pentagon AI chief: Grok helped target 2,000+ Iran strikes; data centers vital
items_flat.title_zh: 五角大廈AI主管：Grok協助鎖定2000多個伊朗打擊目標；資料中心至關重要
items_flat.summary_en: In sworn court filings tied to the NAACP lawsuit over xAI’s Memphis power plant, Pentagon AI chief Cameron Stanley stated xAI’s Grok Gov Model enabled U.S. forces to deploy over 2,000 munitions to distinct targets within 96 hours during Operation Epic Fury. He also argued Colossus 2 and Grok capabilities are vital to national security, targeting, and surge AI demand.
items_flat.summary_zh: 在NAACP控訴xAI孟菲斯發電廠的法庭宣誓文件中，五角大廈AI主管Cameron Stanley表示，xAI Grok Gov Model讓美軍在「Epic Fury行動」96小時內對2000多個獨立目標部署超過2000枚彈藥。他並主張Colossus 2與Grok能力對國家安全、鎖定目標及危機AI需求至關重要。

items_flat.title_en: Tesla driver-assist crash kills Katy homeowner
items_flat.title_zh: 特斯拉輔助駕駛撞入民宅，屋主身亡
items_flat.summary_en: A Tesla Model 3 driver told Harris County investigators an automated driving-assistance system was engaged when the car failed to turn, left the road at high speed, and crashed into a Katy-area home on June 20, killing 69-year-old Martha Avila inside. The driver cooperated and showed no signs of intoxication; sheriff's officials are still investigating whether Autopilot or FSD was active.
items_flat.summary_zh: 哈里斯郡警局稱，6月20日晚一輛特斯拉Model 3駕駛員表示已啟用自動駕駛輔助系統，車輛未能轉彎後高速衝入凱蒂一戶民宅，屋內69歲Martha Avila身亡。駕駛員配合調查且無酒駕跡象，當局仍在查證是否為Autopilot或FSD。

items_flat.title_en: Musk clarifies: Europe must build reusable rockets or 'cease to exist'
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克澄清：歐洲必須開發可重複使用火箭否則將「失去實質意義」
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk replied to criticism of his earlier comments on Europe's space industry, saying media took his words out of context. He reiterated that without reusable rockets, European providers 'will cease to exist in any meaningful sense.' This followed a Financial Times piece on European pushback.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克回應外界對其歐洲太空產業評論的批評，表示媒體斷章取義。他重申若無可重複使用火箭，歐洲業者「將失去任何實質存在意義」。此言呼應《金融時報》報導歐洲反擊其預言。
items_flat.musk_quote: They’re taking my comments out of context. I’m just saying that they need to create reusable rockets or they will cease to exist in any meaningful sense.
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 他們斷章取義我的發言。我只是說，他們需要開發可重複使用火箭，否則將失去任何實質存在意義。

items_flat.title_en: Musk: School admin keeping kindergarten gender transitions secret from parents 'should go to prison'
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克：學校管理人員對幼稚園兒童隱瞞性別轉換、瞞著父母「應入獄」
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk replied to a detailed account of Encinitas, California Assistant Superintendent Amy Illingworth allegedly instructing staff to create secret gender support plans for children as young as kindergarten, hide them from parents, and treat parental teachings on biology as 'misinformation.' Musk wrote that the administrator 'should go to prison for severe child abuse.'
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克回應加州Encinitas助理教育局長Amy Illingworth據報指示教職員為幼稚園起兒童建立秘密性別支持計畫、瞞著父母，並將父母教導的生物現實視為「錯誤資訊」。馬斯克表示該管理人員「應該因嚴重虐待兒童而入獄」。
items_flat.musk_quote: That school administrator should go to prison for severe child abuse
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 那位學校管理人員應該因嚴重虐待兒童而入獄

items_flat.title_en: Fortune: SpaceX IPO rally makes a Tesla merger cheaper on paper
items_flat.title_zh: 《財富》：SpaceX IPO漲勢使特斯拉合併在紙面上更便宜
items_flat.summary_en: A June 20 Fortune analysis argued SpaceX's post-IPO share surge (closing near $185–$191 vs $135 offer) means it could acquire Tesla in an all-stock deal by issuing roughly 38% of shares instead of 46%. The piece linked renewed speculation to comments by Gwynne Shotwell and SpaceX's ~$2.4T valuation.
items_flat.summary_zh: 6月20日《財富》分析指出，SpaceX IPO後股價大漲（收盤約185–191美元 vs 135美元發行價），意味以全股票交易收購特斯拉只需發行約38%股份，而非46%。文章將重新燃起的合併猜測與Gwynne Shotwell言論及SpaceX約2.4兆美元估值連結。

items_flat.title_en: Musk's Tesla voting power nears 20% after 2018 pay-package exercise
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克行使2018薪酬方案後特斯拉投票權接近20%
items_flat.summary_en: Coverage highlighted that Musk's June 16 exercise of ~304 million Tesla options from his 2018 package, via net share settlement with no open-market sales, lifted his direct voting stake to roughly 19.9–20%. Analysts framed the timing amid ongoing corporate and autonomy developments.
items_flat.summary_zh: 報導指出，馬斯克6月16日以淨額股份結算方式（無公開市場出售）行使2018薪酬方案約3.04億股特斯拉選擇權，使其直接投票權提升至約19.9–20%。分析師將此時機置於持續企業與自動駕駛發展背景下討論。

items_flat.title_en: Tesla Semi spotted with ground-truth FSD validation rig
items_flat.title_zh: 特斯拉Semi現身搭載FSD真值驗證設備
items_flat.summary_en: A Tesla Semi was photographed in Sunnyvale, California carrying ground-truth validation equipment Tesla uses before major autonomy rollouts. Teslarati linked the sighting to preparations for a commercial-truck FSD launch, noting the rig was flagged to @SawyerMerritt on X.
items_flat.summary_zh: 有民眾在加州森尼維爾拍到特斯拉Semi搭載真值驗證設備，此類裝備通常在重大自動駕駛功能上線前使用。Teslarati認為這顯示商用卡車FSD即將推出，並轉發標註@SawyerMerritt的X貼文。

items_flat.title_en: Musk forecasts 10x economy and moon base in 10 years
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克預言十年經濟十倍增長及月球基地
items_flat.summary_en: At the 2026 Abundance Summit, Elon Musk told Peter Diamandis that barring a major world war, the global economy could grow more than tenfold over the next decade and that a self-sustaining moon base could arrive on the same timeline. Musk later quote-posted the clip with "Wild times ahead!"
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克在2026 Abundance Summit遠端對談中表示，若無世界大戰等重大衝突，全球經濟十年內可成長逾十倍，同期或可建立自給自足的月球基地。他隨後轉發片段並寫道「瘋狂時代來臨！」。

items_flat.title_en: Electrek: Katy crash lands amid federal FSD scrutiny
items_flat.title_zh: Electrek：凱蒂事故發生於聯邦調查FSD之際
items_flat.summary_en: Electrek reported that Harris County investigators are examining whether Tesla driver-assistance was engaged in the fatal Katy crash, noting the incident arrives as NHTSA already has an upgraded engineering analysis into roughly 2.9 million Teslas over FSD traffic violations.
items_flat.summary_zh: Electrek指出哈里斯郡正調查凱蒂致命事故是否涉及特斯拉駕駛輔助，並強調此事發生於NHTSA已將約290萬輛特斯拉FSD違規調查升級為工程分析之際。

items_flat.title_en: Musk wishes Happy Father's Day amid personal and cultural posts
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克祝父親節快樂，同時發表個人與文化評論
items_flat.summary_en: Elon Musk posted 'Happy Father’s Day!' to his 178k+ like post. He also replied '❤️' to his mother Maye Musk's post, called Karl Marx's dad's letter 'cool,' and engaged with light cultural commentary including 'Makes no sense' on puberty blockers vs. social media age limits and 'Indeed (sigh)' agreeing with J.K. Rowling on women's spaces safety incidents.
items_flat.summary_zh: 馬斯克發文「父親節快樂！」獲超過17.8萬讚。他也回覆母親Maye Musk「❤️」，稱卡爾·馬克思父親的信「很酷」，並對文化議題發表評論，如對青春期阻斷劑與社群媒體年齡限制說「Makes no sense」，以及同意J.K. Rowling關於女性空間安全事件的「Indeed (sigh)」。
items_flat.musk_quote: Happy Father’s Day! ... Karl’s Dad was cool ... Makes no sense ... Indeed (sigh)
items_flat.musk_quote_zh: 父親節快樂！……卡爾的父親很酷……這說不通……確實（嘆氣）

links.label: Elon Musk on X (woke vow Yes)

items_flat.title_en: Musk shares joyful family Cybertruck FSD experience video
items_flat.title_zh: 馬斯克分享家庭體驗Cybertruck FSD的歡樂影片
items_flat.summary_en: Early on June 21, Elon Musk posted a link to a widely viewed video of a pregnant woman and her 2.5-year-old son experiencing FSD in a Cybertruck for the first time, showing excitement and leading the family to order one. The post garnered over 126k likes. Tesla official account separately amplified user FSD door-to-door and safety stories.
items_flat.summary_zh: 6月21日清晨，馬斯克貼出廣受關注影片，一名孕婦與2.5歲兒子首次體驗Cybertruck FSD，表現興奮並導致全家訂購。貼文獲超過12.6萬讚。Tesla官方帳號也轉發用戶FSD門到門與安全故事。

items_flat.title_en: SpaceX launches Starlink 17-28 successfully from Vandenberg
items_flat.title_zh: SpaceX從范登堡成功發射Starlink 17-28任務
items_flat.summary_en: SpaceX's Falcon 9 launched 24 Starlink V2 Mini satellites from Vandenberg SLC-4E on June 21 around 16:39 UTC on booster B1063 (33rd flight). The official @SpaceX post invited viewers to watch the live broadcast. User reports and tracking confirmed successful deployment and booster landing on Of Course I Still Love You droneship. This was the targeted date after prior delay.
items_flat.summary_zh: SpaceX Falcon 9於6月21日約16:39 UTC從范登堡SLC-4E發射24顆Starlink V2 Mini衛星，使用助推器B1063（第33次飛行）。@SpaceX官方貼文邀請觀看直播。用戶報告與追蹤確認衛星部署成功，助推器降落在「Of Course I Still Love You」無人船上。此為先前延期後的目標日期。

items_flat.title_en: Refreshed Tesla Semi seen testing FSD validation hardware
items_flat.title_zh: 改款特斯拉 Semi 首度曝光 FSD 驗證硬體
items_flat.summary_en: A refreshed Tesla Semi was photographed carrying FSD validation equipment—the first public sighting of active autonomy testing on the electric truck. Basenor reported June 21 that engineers appear to be gathering real-world data toward certifying FSD for Class 8 freight operations.
items_flat.summary_zh: 改款 Tesla Semi 被拍到搭載 FSD 驗證設備，為電動卡車自動駕駛測試首次公開紀錄。Basenor 6 月 21 日稱，工程團隊似正收集實路資料，為 Class 8 貨卡 FSD 認證做準備。

items_flat.summary_en: Tesla's official account quote-posted an owner claiming a zero-intervention trip from a home garage to an office parking spot using FSD Supervised, adding that it is "the only system" that can take drivers door to door.
items_flat.summary_zh: 特斯拉官方帳號轉發車主稱以FSD Supervised從車庫零介入開至辦公室停車位，並強調這是唯一能實現「門到門」自動駕駛的系統。

items_flat.summary_en: Tesla amplified a user video of FSD v14.3.4 swerving to avoid a sideswipe, captioning the post "Preventing sideswipes." The clip was shared as part of Tesla's ongoing social push showcasing recent supervised-driving safety maneuvers.
items_flat.summary_zh: 特斯拉轉發車主影片，顯示FSD v14.3.4自動閃避側向擦撞，配文「防止側撞」。此為特斯拉近期在社群媒體上推廣監督式自動駕駛安全表現的一環。

items_flat.title_en: X main feed now promotes Grok Build at the top
items_flat.summary_en: Users reported that X is placing Grok Build promotional content at the top of the main feed, expanding visibility for xAI's terminal-based coding agent beyond its existing SuperGrok and X Premium Plus subscriber base.
items_flat.summary_zh: 用戶回報X平台已在主動態頂部投放Grok Build推廣內容，擴大xAI終端機程式碼代理在既有SuperGrok及X Premium Plus訂閱戶之外的曝光。

elon_personal.title_en: Musk forecasts 10x economy and moon base in 10 years
elon_personal.title_zh: 馬斯克預測10年內經濟成長10倍並建立月球基地
elon_personal.summary_en: At the 2026 Abundance Summit, Elon Musk told Peter Diamandis that barring major world war, the global economy could grow more than tenfold in a decade and a self-sustaining moon base could arrive on the same timeline. Musk quote-posted the clip today with 'Wild times ahead!' amplifying his long-term vision.
elon_personal.summary_zh: 馬斯克在2026 Abundance Summit 對Peter Diamandis表示，若無重大世界大戰，全球經濟10年內可成長超過10倍，自給自足的月球基地可能同期實現。他今日在X轉發影片並寫「Wild times ahead!」，強調長期願景。
elon_personal.musk_quote: I'd say the economy is 10 times the its current size in 10 years. ... In the absence of World War III ... the economy 10xes in 10 years and have a base on the moon. Wild times ahead!
elon_personal.musk_quote_zh: 我會說經濟規模在10年內會是現在的10倍以上……若無第三次世界大戰……經濟將在10年內成長10倍，並擁有月球基地。未來將非常精彩！

elon_personal.title_zh: 馬斯克：學校管理人員對幼稚園兒童隱瞞性別轉換、瞞著父母「應入獄」
elon_personal.summary_en: Elon Musk replied to a detailed account of Encinitas, California Assistant Superintendent Amy Illingworth allegedly instructing staff to create secret gender support plans for children as young as kindergarten, hide them from parents, and treat parental teachings on biology as 'misinformation.' Musk wrote that the administrator 'should go to prison for severe child abuse.'
elon_personal.summary_zh: 馬斯克回應加州Encinitas助理教育局長Amy Illingworth據報指示教職員為幼稚園起兒童建立秘密性別支持計畫、瞞著父母，並將父母教導的生物現實視為「錯誤資訊」。馬斯克表示該管理人員「應該因嚴重虐待兒童而入獄」。
elon_personal.musk_quote: That school administrator should go to prison for severe child abuse
elon_personal.musk_quote_zh: 那位學校管理人員應該因嚴重虐待兒童而入獄

elon_personal.title_en: Musk forecasts 10x economy and moon base in 10 years
elon_personal.title_zh: 馬斯克預言十年經濟十倍增長及月球基地
elon_personal.summary_en: At the 2026 Abundance Summit, Elon Musk told Peter Diamandis that barring a major world war, the global economy could grow more than tenfold over the next decade and that a self-sustaining moon base could arrive on the same timeline. Musk later quote-posted the clip with "Wild times ahead!"
elon_personal.summary_zh: 馬斯克在2026 Abundance Summit遠端對談中表示，若無世界大戰等重大衝突，全球經濟十年內可成長逾十倍，同期或可建立自給自足的月球基地。他隨後轉發片段並寫道「瘋狂時代來臨！」。

elon_personal.title_en: Musk wishes Happy Father's Day amid personal and cultural posts
elon_personal.title_zh: 馬斯克祝父親節快樂，同時發表個人與文化評論
elon_personal.summary_en: Elon Musk posted 'Happy Father’s Day!' to his 178k+ like post. He also replied '❤️' to his mother Maye Musk's post, called Karl Marx's dad's letter 'cool,' and engaged with light cultural commentary including 'Makes no sense' on puberty blockers vs. social media age limits and 'Indeed (sigh)' agreeing with J.K. Rowling on women's spaces safety incidents.
elon_personal.summary_zh: 馬斯克發文「父親節快樂！」獲超過17.8萬讚。他也回覆母親Maye Musk「❤️」，稱卡爾·馬克思父親的信「很酷」，並對文化議題發表評論，如對青春期阻斷劑與社群媒體年齡限制說「Makes no sense」，以及同意J.K. Rowling關於女性空間安全事件的「Indeed (sigh)」。
elon_personal.musk_quote: Happy Father’s Day! ... Karl’s Dad was cool ... Makes no sense ... Indeed (sigh)
elon_personal.musk_quote_zh: 父親節快樂！……卡爾的父親很酷……這說不通……確實（嘆氣）

links.label: Elon Musk on X (woke vow Yes)

tesla.title_en: Fatal Katy, Texas Tesla crash; driver claims automated assist engaged
tesla.title_zh: 德州Katy致命車禍；駕駛稱特斯拉自動輔助系統已啟動
tesla.summary_en: Harris County authorities reported a Tesla Model 3 failed to turn at an intersection on June 20 evening, sped into a Katy-area home and killed 69-year-old Martha Avila inside. The 44-year-old driver told deputies an automated driving-assistance system was engaged. Investigators are verifying; the incident comes amid ongoing federal FSD scrutiny.
tesla.summary_zh: Harris County當局表示，6月20日晚間一輛特斯拉Model 3未轉彎，高速衝入Katy地區民宅，撞死屋內69歲Martha Avila。44歲駕駛告訴警員自動駕駛輔助系統已啟動。調查人員正驗證；此事件正值聯邦FSD審查期間。

tesla.title_en: Tesla driver-assist crash kills Katy homeowner
tesla.title_zh: 特斯拉輔助駕駛撞入民宅，屋主身亡
tesla.summary_en: A Tesla Model 3 driver told Harris County investigators an automated driving-assistance system was engaged when the car failed to turn, left the road at high speed, and crashed into a Katy-area home on June 20, killing 69-year-old Martha Avila inside. The driver cooperated and showed no signs of intoxication; sheriff's officials are still investigating whether Autopilot or FSD was active.
tesla.summary_zh: 哈里斯郡警局稱，6月20日晚一輛特斯拉Model 3駕駛員表示已啟用自動駕駛輔助系統，車輛未能轉彎後高速衝入凱蒂一戶民宅，屋內69歲Martha Avila身亡。駕駛員配合調查且無酒駕跡象，當局仍在查證是否為Autopilot或FSD。

tesla.title_en: Musk's Tesla voting power nears 20% after 2018 pay-package exercise
tesla.title_zh: 馬斯克行使2018薪酬方案後特斯拉投票權接近20%
tesla.summary_en: Coverage highlighted that Musk's June 16 exercise of ~304 million Tesla options from his 2018 package, via net share settlement with no open-market sales, lifted his direct voting stake to roughly 19.9–20%. Analysts framed the timing amid ongoing corporate and autonomy developments.
tesla.summary_zh: 報導指出，馬斯克6月16日以淨額股份結算方式（無公開市場出售）行使2018薪酬方案約3.04億股特斯拉選擇權，使其直接投票權提升至約19.9–20%。分析師將此時機置於持續企業與自動駕駛發展背景下討論。

tesla.title_en: Tesla Semi spotted with ground-truth FSD validation rig
tesla.title_zh: 特斯拉Semi現身搭載FSD真值驗證設備
tesla.summary_en: A Tesla Semi was photographed in Sunnyvale, California carrying ground-truth validation equipment Tesla uses before major autonomy rollouts. Teslarati linked the sighting to preparations for a commercial-truck FSD launch, noting the rig was flagged to @SawyerMerritt on X.
tesla.summary_zh: 有民眾在加州森尼維爾拍到特斯拉Semi搭載真值驗證設備，此類裝備通常在重大自動駕駛功能上線前使用。Teslarati認為這顯示商用卡車FSD即將推出，並轉發標註@SawyerMerritt的X貼文。

tesla.title_en: Electrek: Katy crash lands amid federal FSD scrutiny
tesla.title_zh: Electrek：凱蒂事故發生於聯邦調查FSD之際
tesla.summary_en: Electrek reported that Harris County investigators are examining whether Tesla driver-assistance was engaged in the fatal Katy crash, noting the incident arrives as NHTSA already has an upgraded engineering analysis into roughly 2.9 million Teslas over FSD traffic violations.
tesla.summary_zh: Electrek指出哈里斯郡正調查凱蒂致命事故是否涉及特斯拉駕駛輔助，並強調此事發生於NHTSA已將約290萬輛特斯拉FSD違規調查升級為工程分析之際。

tesla.title_en: Musk shares joyful family Cybertruck FSD experience video
tesla.title_zh: 馬斯克分享家庭體驗Cybertruck FSD的歡樂影片
tesla.summary_en: Early on June 21, Elon Musk posted a link to a widely viewed video of a pregnant woman and her 2.5-year-old son experiencing FSD in a Cybertruck for the first time, showing excitement and leading the family to order one. The post garnered over 126k likes. Tesla official account separately amplified user FSD door-to-door and safety stories.
tesla.summary_zh: 6月21日清晨，馬斯克貼出廣受關注影片，一名孕婦與2.5歲兒子首次體驗Cybertruck FSD，表現興奮並導致全家訂購。貼文獲超過12.6萬讚。Tesla官方帳號也轉發用戶FSD門到門與安全故事。

tesla.title_en: Refreshed Tesla Semi seen testing FSD validation hardware
tesla.title_zh: 改款特斯拉 Semi 首度曝光 FSD 驗證硬體
tesla.summary_en: A refreshed Tesla Semi was photographed carrying FSD validation equipment—the first public sighting of active autonomy testing on the electric truck. Basenor reported June 21 that engineers appear to be gathering real-world data toward certifying FSD for Class 8 freight operations.
tesla.summary_zh: 改款 Tesla Semi 被拍到搭載 FSD 驗證設備，為電動卡車自動駕駛測試首次公開紀錄。Basenor 6 月 21 日稱，工程團隊似正收集實路資料，為 Class 8 貨卡 FSD 認證做準備。

tesla.summary_en: Tesla's official account quote-posted an owner claiming a zero-intervention trip from a home garage to an office parking spot using FSD Supervised, adding that it is "the only system" that can take drivers door to door.
tesla.summary_zh: 特斯拉官方帳號轉發車主稱以FSD Supervised從車庫零介入開至辦公室停車位，並強調這是唯一能實現「門到門」自動駕駛的系統。

tesla.summary_en: Tesla amplified a user video of FSD v14.3.4 swerving to avoid a sideswipe, captioning the post "Preventing sideswipes." The clip was shared as part of Tesla's ongoing social push showcasing recent supervised-driving safety maneuvers.
tesla.summary_zh: 特斯拉轉發車主影片，顯示FSD v14.3.4自動閃避側向擦撞，配文「防止側撞」。此為特斯拉近期在社群媒體上推廣監督式自動駕駛安全表現的一環。

spacex.title_en: Trump unveils interim Air Force One with Starlink communications
spacex.title_zh: 川普揭露配備Starlink通訊的臨時空軍一號
spacex.summary_en: President Donald Trump formally introduced a Qatar-gifted Boeing 747-8 at Joint Base Andrews on June 19 as an interim Air Force One, highlighting advanced communications including SpaceX Starlink. He remarked that 'my friend Elon is going to be very happy.' The roughly $400 million jet is a stopgap before new VC-25B aircraft.
spacex.summary_zh: 美國總統唐納·川普6月19日在安德魯斯聯合基地正式介紹卡達贈送的波音747-8，稱為配備先進通訊（包括SpaceX Starlink）的臨時空軍一號。他表示「我的朋友Elon會很開心」。這架約4億美元的飛機是新VC-25B服役前的過渡機型。

spacex.title_en: Musk clarifies: Europe must build reusable rockets or 'cease to exist'
spacex.title_zh: 馬斯克澄清：歐洲必須開發可重複使用火箭否則將「失去實質意義」
spacex.summary_en: Elon Musk replied to criticism of his earlier comments on Europe's space industry, saying media took his words out of context. He reiterated that without reusable rockets, European providers 'will cease to exist in any meaningful sense.' This followed a Financial Times piece on European pushback.
spacex.summary_zh: 馬斯克回應外界對其歐洲太空產業評論的批評，表示媒體斷章取義。他重申若無可重複使用火箭，歐洲業者「將失去任何實質存在意義」。此言呼應《金融時報》報導歐洲反擊其預言。
spacex.musk_quote: They’re taking my comments out of context. I’m just saying that they need to create reusable rockets or they will cease to exist in any meaningful sense.
spacex.musk_quote_zh: 他們斷章取義我的發言。我只是說，他們需要開發可重複使用火箭，否則將失去任何實質存在意義。

spacex.title_en: SpaceX launches Starlink 17-28 successfully from Vandenberg
spacex.title_zh: SpaceX從范登堡成功發射Starlink 17-28任務
spacex.summary_en: SpaceX's Falcon 9 launched 24 Starlink V2 Mini satellites from Vandenberg SLC-4E on June 21 around 16:39 UTC on booster B1063 (33rd flight). The official @SpaceX post invited viewers to watch the live broadcast. User reports and tracking confirmed successful deployment and booster landing on Of Course I Still Love You droneship. This was the targeted date after prior delay.
spacex.summary_zh: SpaceX Falcon 9於6月21日約16:39 UTC從范登堡SLC-4E發射24顆Starlink V2 Mini衛星，使用助推器B1063（第33次飛行）。@SpaceX官方貼文邀請觀看直播。用戶報告與追蹤確認衛星部署成功，助推器降落在「Of Course I Still Love You」無人船上。此為先前延期後的目標日期。

xai_x_platform.title_en: Pentagon AI chief: Grok helped target 2,000+ Iran strikes; data centers vital
xai_x_platform.title_zh: 五角大廈AI主管：Grok協助鎖定2000多個伊朗打擊目標；資料中心至關重要
xai_x_platform.summary_en: In sworn court filings tied to the NAACP lawsuit over xAI’s Memphis power plant, Pentagon AI chief Cameron Stanley stated xAI’s Grok Gov Model enabled U.S. forces to deploy over 2,000 munitions to distinct targets within 96 hours during Operation Epic Fury. He also argued Colossus 2 and Grok capabilities are vital to national security, targeting, and surge AI demand.
xai_x_platform.summary_zh: 在NAACP控訴xAI孟菲斯發電廠的法庭宣誓文件中，五角大廈AI主管Cameron Stanley表示，xAI Grok Gov Model讓美軍在「Epic Fury行動」96小時內對2000多個獨立目標部署超過2000枚彈藥。他並主張Colossus 2與Grok能力對國家安全、鎖定目標及危機AI需求至關重要。

xai_x_platform.title_en: X main feed now promotes Grok Build at the top
xai_x_platform.summary_en: Users reported that X is placing Grok Build promotional content at the top of the main feed, expanding visibility for xAI's terminal-based coding agent beyond its existing SuperGrok and X Premium Plus subscriber base.
xai_x_platform.summary_zh: 用戶回報X平台已在主動態頂部投放Grok Build推廣內容，擴大xAI終端機程式碼代理在既有SuperGrok及X Premium Plus訂閱戶之外的曝光。

other.title_en: Fortune: SpaceX IPO rally makes a Tesla merger cheaper on paper
other.title_zh: 《財富》：SpaceX IPO漲勢使特斯拉合併在紙面上更便宜
other.summary_en: A June 20 Fortune analysis argued SpaceX's post-IPO share surge (closing near $185–$191 vs $135 offer) means it could acquire Tesla in an all-stock deal by issuing roughly 38% of shares instead of 46%. The piece linked renewed speculation to comments by Gwynne Shotwell and SpaceX's ~$2.4T valuation.
other.summary_zh: 6月20日《財富》分析指出，SpaceX IPO後股價大漲（收盤約185–191美元 vs 135美元發行價），意味以全股票交易收購特斯拉只需發行約38%股份，而非46%。文章將重新燃起的合併猜測與Gwynne Shotwell言論及SpaceX約2.4兆美元估值連結。

brief_en: Elon Musk amplified his forecast of a 10x global economy and moon base in 10 years barring WW3, clarified that Europe must adopt reusable rockets or 'cease to exist in any meaningful sense,' and said a California school administrator keeping gender transitions secret from parents of kindergarteners 'should go to prison for severe child abuse.' SpaceX launched 24 more Starlink satellites successfully from Vandenberg.
brief_zh: 馬斯克預測10年經濟10倍成長與月球基地，澄清歐洲需可重複火箭否則消失，並指加州幼兒園隱瞞性別轉換管理員應入獄。SpaceX成功發射24顆Starlink。
